---
title: "PSTH Widget"
---

## Overview

Developer documentation for `PSTHWidget`, which displays Peri-Stimulus Time Histogram plots showing event counts or rates aligned to a reference event.

## Source Location

`src/WhiskerToolbox/Plots/PSTHWidget/`

## Architecture

*TODO: Document widget architecture, state management, and key classes.*

## Key Classes

- `PSTHWidget` — Main widget class

## See Also

- [Plot Widget Guide](../plot_widget_guide.md)
